title: HOPE STATION - 211info
text: HOPE STATION HOPE STATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a co-op with groceries, clothing, household goods, and other necessities. Members may shop twice per month. Non-members may access the community food pantry, which provides items such as bread, tortillas, produce, prepackaged meals, snacks, milk, and desserts. Items may vary by season. Pantry services are available once per week. 1337 Madison Street NE Suite 115 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Membership: One family member must be working at least part-time. Those receiving SNAP or TANF are not eligible. Food pantry: Unrestricted Hours: Membership: Tuesday/Saturday by appointment Food pantry: Monday-Thursday 11:30am-2:30pm Email (503) 339-7710 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 339-7710 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Membership: Call for appointment or visit website for more information Non-member food pantry: Walk-in. Bring own boxes or bags. FEES: Membership: $40 per month plus 2 hours of volunteer time Food pantry: None DOCUMENTS: Membership: Proof of income, photo ID Food pantry: None AREA SERVED: Marion, Polk, and Yamhill Counties Services: Food Cooperatives Food Pantries General Clothing Provision If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOPE STATION
